resume.rawText:
Summary
Self-motivated go-getter with over 10 years of experience in sales. Known for exceptional customer service and executing
sales strategies that produce results. Natural proclivity to understanding technology and how to sell to clients. Excellent at
building alliances and partnerships with customers, prospects and colleagues. 
Experience
Gracer-West Holdings | Salem, OR
Estate Manager | 01/2021 - Present
Maintained and managed a large household and complex of upscale properties for a private client. Role included accounting,
managing staff, coordinating events, overseeing new projects, and setting up a successful rental property. Responsible for
working with owner to execute an overall plan for all properties. Developed acute business skills in computers, finance,
planning and organization. Set a service standard of excellence while on the premises and produced amazing results for
client. 
SOYOUU LLC | Keizer, OR
Owner | 01/2013 - 01/2023
Operated a successful college textbook business for 10 years. Over the course of those years was able to sharpen outside
sales skills. Cultivated relationships that were pivotal in understanding how to deliver superior customer service. Achieved
over 95% positive customer reviews throughout those 10 years in business. Gained expertise in several well known selling
platforms such as Amazon FBA, AbeBooks, Alibris, Ebay, Etsy, Facebook and Walmart. Experience with building lucrative
products and marketing them to consumers. 
Skills
Customer service, Communication skills, Computer literacy, Guest services, Leadership, Conversational Italian,
Conversational Spanish, Quicken, Typing, Outside Sales, Analytical Thinking, Customer service, Knowledge of Main Sales
Platforms, Advertising, Negotiation, Active Listening, Prospect Communication, Identifying Client Needs, Product
Demonstrations, Word, Excel, Microsoft Office Suite 365
Education
University of Oregon | Eugene, OR
Languages
Studied for 2 years at the University of Oregon from 2007-2009. Developed an affinity with languages, most notably Spanish
and Italian. That love of languages and culture translated into an abroad trip through UO in 2009/10 to Rosario and Buenos
Aires, Argentina. Increased proficiency in Spanish while studying at the University of Rosario. After that completed
TEFL/TESL certificate for teaching English as a second language in Buenos Aires. In 2010 got accepted into the UO
Internship abroad program in Puerto Lopez, Ecuador. In Puerto Lopez was in charge of tagging and monitoring turtles, manta
rays, sharks, albatross and other native wildlife to the area. While there lead an educational conservation group in Spanish for
the local kids of the community. 
Apicius International School of Hospitality | Firenze, Toscana
Enology | 05/2012
Graduated with certificate of excellence in enology (study of wine). This was a one year program in wine studies, it was held
in Florence, Italy. Studied marketing in wine, viticulture, and basic sommelier skills. While there interned as a sommelier for
student run restaurant Ganzo. The second half of the year interned with an exporter, specializing in Italian wines. 
South Salem High School | Salem, OR
Broad Curriculum | 06/2007
Selected to be part of the International Baccalaureate program which is an honors program for students. Maintained a 3.2
GPA while taking a rigorous course load. Excelled in languages, most notably Spanish and French. Placed in the top 10 out
of all the high schools in our local area for the French Level 2 exam. Demonstrated great aptitude in the arts and letters.
Involved in speech club and athletics during that time. Chosen to be on the varsity tennis and swim team for all 4 years of
high school. 
Jennifer Bellini
503-884-2629 | jennifer.1232@hotmail.com | Keizer, OR

Languages
English, Italian, Spanish

1.question: In your most recent role, what part of the work felt most like you?
1.answer: making marketing materials, design materials. building sop's, automations and tools for business. Developing scripts and pitch decks. working directly with customers and understanding there desires and then building solutions around them.

2.question: What part of the role drained you fastest?
2.answer: endless sales cycles, jumping from one task to another, not being able to go deep on something, jumping from in home , to cold calls, to pitch decks, to scripts to meetings. I want to feel completed with my work. ship something see how it takes and iterate. sales feels like always chasing the same win

3.question: What do others come to you for that isn’t necessarily in your job description?
3.answer: everything i mentioned in prompt 1, and guidance, empathy , listening and good instincts about people and business direction.

4.question: What type of challenge feels exciting rather than overwhelming?
4.answer: discovering bottlenecks and creating strategies to break them. designing beautiful materials for people to look at and engage with. and building tools and automations that make the business run more efficiently .

5.question: Outside of work, what do you spend time practicing, improving, or maintaining? 2–4 bullets.
5.answer: App building, interior design, songwriting, producing

synthesis.patternSummary:
You don't just hit targets — you protect measurement integrity.

When something isn't working, you don't argue — you audit the measure.

You measure, isolate, and test.
operateBest: Work where measures and incentives are consistent.
Work with explicit scope, ownership, and a stable cadence.
Work where dependencies can be made explicit and handoffs are defined.
loseEnergy: Work where measures change mid-cycle or incentives conflict.
Work where ownership is unclear and scope drift is accepted.
Work where priorities reset each cycle without constraints.

why_primary: Matched anchors: relationship, client, team, partnership, alliance
why_not_adjacent: Product Development Lead: missing anchors development, system, process
Account Manager: missing anchors outcome, renewal
